### Solution:
```javascript
function parseLog(log) {
    const words = log.split(' ');
    const template = [];
    for (const word of words) {
        if (word.includes('bytes') || word.includes('lifetime')) {
            template.push(word.replace(/[0-9]/g, '*'));
        } else {
            template.push(word);
        }
    }
    return template.join(' ');
}
```
